results.title: mokker.ai: Professional photos of your product - made with AI | Product Hunt
results.content:
4.8

Based on 6 reviews

Review mokker.ai?

mokker.ai is praised for its innovative approach to generating diverse product images without the need for traditional photo shoots, making it appealing for startups and small businesses. Users appreciate its smooth user interface and ease of use, though some express concerns about subscription management and the handling of complex product features. While the tool is effective for consistent datasets, there are calls for improved onboarding and prompt interfaces. Overall, mokker.ai is seen as a valuable tool for enhancing product photography and boosting sales, particularly in e-commerce.

Has become a core part of my workflows around my Etsy store. Achieving >50% higher sales volumes thanks to materially better images on my listings while paying less than for manual agencies before. Love this!

cost-effective for startups (2)improves sales volume (1)

Report

•1 review [...] Hey there, just came across Mokker.ai here on Product Hunt and took it for a spin. Here's my take: Pros: 1. The idea is certainly innovative. Being able to generate varied environmental shots for a product without the need for elaborate photo-shoots can be a game-changer, especially for startups and small businesses with tight budgets. 2. The user interface is straightforward and the uploading process was hassle-free. And my concern: I'm curious about how the AI handles products with reflective surfaces, complex geometries, or those that interact with the environment in unique ways. Some guidelines or examples would be helpful for users to set expectations. Overall, Mokker.ai fills an interesting gap in the market. With some refinements, it has the potential to revolutionize product

results.title: Midjourney Reviews (2026) - Product Hunt
results.content:
#### vs Alternatives

When I first started using it it was relatively good. The prompts were occasionally followed, and the final quality of the output was pretty good

Pacioli

#### What's great

Midjourney’s website makes AI image creation far more accessible and powerful, but the experience can still feel inconsistent and frustrating at times. It’s fantastic because it combines stunning, high quality image generation with an intuitive visual interface and a rich creative ecosystem that makes exploring, editing, and refining ideas feel seamless and inspiring.

#### What needs improvement

It sometimes misinterprets detailed prompts and the user often need to try multiple times to get what they want

#### vs Alternatives [...] #### vs Alternatives

We would chose Midjourney is widely recognized for producing more cinematic, stylized, and visually striking images. It is strong in Concept art, Fantasy visuals and Branding & creative work so it is best for artistic imagery.

Ivan Boiko

#### What's great

This has been a total game-changer for my creative process. Whenever I'm stuck, I just spend 10 minutes playing with prompts, and it gives me a dozen new ideas.

#### What needs improvement

#### vs Alternatives

Stable Diffusion
Nano Banana

It's famous for its "opinionated" style. By default, it produces images that are highly artistic, coherent, and visually stunning. Many feel its output has a "finished" or "professional" look right out of the box.

Faisal Karkoh

#### What's great

Midjourney isn’t just an image generator — it feels more like a creative collaborator.

It consistently produces outputs that look “designed,” not just generated. Even with minimal prompting, the results often have strong composition, lighting, and style, which significantly speeds up the ideation process.
